title: My safety: smart connected products
body: "  The Office for Product Safety and Standards is leading a fresh campaign to raise awareness of safety issues associated with consumer products that can connect to the internet or a network. Resources are provided for use by local authorities, community groups and the public, including social media materials.  Resources  Stakeholder toolkit    Smart connected product awareness stakeholder toolkit  (PDF, 1.79 MB, 14 pages)   Social media materials  Messages   Setting up new tech? Make sure it’s secure New tech? Follow our safe setup checklist Unboxed new tech? Make sure it’s secure New tech? Quick tips for safe setup How to set up devices safely Your easy security checklist for new devices Your tech passwords should be new, strong and unique First thing when you unbox? Change that password Keep new tech safe. Think: password, security, privacy New tech? Lock it down. Think: password, security, privacy New device? Always change the default password when prompted Keep your new device safe. Remember: password, security, privacy   English    Smart connected products safety SM01  (PNG, 184 KB)  Smart connected products safety SM02  (PNG, 187 KB)  Smart connected products safety SM03  (PNG, 263 KB)  Smart connected products safety SM04  (PNG, 265 KB)  Smart connected products safety SM05  (PNG, 196 KB)  Smart connected products safety SM06  (PNG, 194 KB)  Smart connected products safety SM07  (PNG, 222 KB)  Smart connected products safety SM08  (PNG, 231 KB)  Smart connected products safety SM09  (PNG, 216 KB)  Smart connected products safety SM10  (PNG, 236 KB)  Smart connected products safety SM11  (PNG, 191 KB)  Smart connected products safety SM12  (PNG, 196 KB)   Welsh    Welsh Smart connected products safety SM01  (PNG, 389 KB)  Welsh Smart connected products safety SM02  (PNG, 396 KB)  Welsh Smart connected products safety SM02  (PNG, 396 KB)  Welsh Smart connected products safety SM04  (PNG, 538 KB)  Welsh Smart connected products safety SM05  (PNG, 419 KB)  Welsh Smart connected products safety SM06  (PNG, 407 KB)  Welsh Smart connected products safety SM07  (PNG, 439 KB)  Welsh Smart connected products safety SM08  (PNG, 431 KB)  Welsh Smart connected products safety SM09  (PNG, 419 KB)  Welsh Smart connected products safety SM10  (PNG, 437 KB)  Welsh Smart connected products safety SM11  (PNG, 402 KB)  Welsh Smart connected products safety SM12  (PNG, 411 KB)  "
